What can I even say? The police are sitting idle. 
Sanjay had been receiving threats from these 
criminals for money for days. Did the police know 
nothing? What happened? A child had to pay the 
price for the police’s negligence. Killing for money 
is one thing, but you even killed the child! You 
emptied a mother’s lap! Who will wipe the tears of 
that family? If you want to kill someone, shoot 
Nirihar Singh in the chest! Let me see who has the 
courage! Cowards! The police must answer for 
this. The administration must answer to the people. 
We will see this through till the end. If the police 
cannot do it, they should say so. Give me twenty-
four hours. I will bring these criminals here myself 
and finish them. I am a man of my word — Nirihar 
Singh is my name! Shame on the Bengal police!
